norm_1.content: No one is allowed to smoke indoors.
norm_1.subject: no one

norm_2.content: Patrons are expected to keep noise levels moderate.
norm_2.subject: patrons

norm_3.content: Tipping is encouraged after receiving service.
norm_3.subject: patrons

norm_4.content: Most people leave empty cups in designated recycling bins.
norm_4.subject: most people
norm_4.object: empty cups in designated recycling bins

norm_5.content: Customers should not occupy tables without ordering food or drinks.
norm_5.subject: customers
norm_5.object: occupy tables without ordering food or drinks
